metadata.description: VeChain-specific AI tools (skills, plugins, agents) for developers and AI agents building on the VeChainThor blockchain.

plugins.name: vechain-dev
plugins.description: Full-stack VeChain development — dApps, smart contracts, fee delegation, testing, security, and DeFi ecosystem (VeBetterDAO, StarGate, governance)

plugins.name: karpathy-guidelines
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes — surface assumptions, surgical changes, simplicity first, verifiable success criteria

plugins.name: translate
plugins.description: Manages react-i18next translation files across 15 languages — adds/removes keys, keeps files sorted, enforces fixed-word rules, verifies sync

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Interview you relentlessly about every aspect of a plan until shared understanding — walks the design tree, resolves dependencies one-by-one
